data.title: 𝐍𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑𝐍 𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐃𝐀𝐍𝐀𝐎 𝐎𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐋𝐃 𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐆𝐄: 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐖𝐒𝐈𝐒 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 𝐕𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲! 🌍
data.description:
From the heart of Northern Mindanao to the global stage in Geneva, Switzerland! #YourDICTRegionX is immensely proud to earn top international honors at the 2026 World Summit on the Information Society (WSIS) Prizes!

What does global recognition mean to #YourDICTRegionX? It means our mission to empower the Filipino people is being heard worldwide.

WORLD-CLASS INITIATIVES, REAL COMMUNITY IMPACT

Winner | Cultural Diversity & Identity (Digital Souls, Native Tongues: The LAKIP Story)
Technology should speak your language. We are preserving our identity by translating 26 ICT courses into Bisaya—breaking down language barriers to make digital education truly inclusive and accessible to all.

Champion | E-Business Applications (From Queues to Clicks: A Digital Gateway for 30 Filipino Communities)
Putting citizens first. Through the Electronic Business One-Stop Shop (eBOSS), we’ve transformed how 30 local government units operate—cutting red tape, ending long lines, and bringing efficient digital government services straight to the people.

GLOBAL FINALISTS | WSIS Photo Contest
Eight (8) of our regional photo entries were named global finalists, capturing the raw, inspiring, and human stories of digital transformation across Northern Mindanao.

WALANG MAIIWAN SA DIGITAL BAYANIHAN

Behind every system, course, and photo entry is a Filipino whose life is being changed for the better. These awards reaffirm our commitment to building digitally empowered communities where innovation creates real opportunity for everyone.

This is why we do what we do. Mabuhay ang Northern Mindanao! Mabuhay ang Pilipinas!

#DICT #DigitalBayanihan #BagongPilipinas #GoodVibesLang #YourDICTRegionX #WSISPrizes2026 #WSIS2026 #DigitalTransformation #LAKIP #eBOSS

data.title: 🎖️ 𝐈𝐓’𝐒 𝐎𝐅𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐀𝐋: 𝐃𝐈𝐂𝐓 𝐗 𝐢𝐬 𝐈𝐒𝐎 𝐂𝐄𝐑𝐓𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐄𝐃! ⚙️
data.description:
Behind every seamless public service is a system designed for excellence.

After more than a year of rigorous process overhauls, risk mapping, and cross-regional collaboration, DICT Regional Office X has officially earned its ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System Certification!

NATIONWIDE MILESTONE: We are proud to stand as only the second DICT regional office in the entire Philippines to achieve this distinction!

This achievement reflects the collective effort of our entire team—from top management and QMS leads to our dedicated internal auditors, process owners, and frontline staff.

How We Engineered Quality:

Groundwork & Alignment (Feb 2025): Kickstarted our QMS transformation through organization-wide learning sessions built around global quality standards.

Cross-Regional Synergy: Gained crucial implementation insights by benchmarking with DICT Region IX, guided by Regional Director Cheryl Ortega and Mr. Aris Austria (now ARD of DICT Region XI).

Refining Our Systems: Streamlined regional workflows, eliminated operational bottlenecks, mapped organizational risks, and updated policies through interactive workshops and focus groups.

Rigorous Evaluation: Passed three thorough assessment tiers to solidify our operational readiness, backed by key support from Mr. Christian Roy Melad (now OIC-RD of DICT Region V).

Archival & Records Mastery: Partnered with the National Archives of the Philippines to elevate our records management, classification, and retention protocols to world-class standards.

Built for Quality. Driven by Public Trust.

An ISO certification isn't just a plaque on the wall—it's a systematic guarantee that Northern Mindanao gets transparent, efficient, and reliable government service every single day.

Our processes are locked in. Our commitment to excellence continues.

#YourDICTRegionX #ISO90012015 #QualityManagementSystem #PublicServiceExcellence #NorthernMindanao #SerbisyongDICT #BagongPilipinas

data.title: 𝐁𝐢𝐠 𝐖𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐃𝐈𝐂𝐓 𝐑𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐗! 🏆✨
data.description:
We’re coming home from the Festival of Innovation Awards 2026 with hearts full of gratitude! #YourDICTRegionX received a Special Mention for Digital Agency of the Year, specifically for our work bringing the Smart Village to life in Dalingap, Clarin.

Seeing a community gain access to eGovernment services and new digital livelihoods is the real "award" for us!

A huge shoutout to our very own Kenneth T. Asuncion (Provincial Officer, Misamis Occidental) for being a finalist for the Rising Digital Star Award. From ChildSafe Thursdays to grassroots ICT projects, your dedication is inspiring!

Awards are just the cherry on top. Our commitment to Northern Mindanao stays the same: We build, we connect, and we make sure no one is left behind.

#DICTRegionX #SmartVillage #ICT4D #MisamisOccidental #GoodVibesLang
